summary:
Vitamin C is crucial for collagen production, directly affecting gum tissue structure and function. Its deficiency results in weakened gingival tissues, leading to symptoms such as bleeding gums—making it the primary nutrient linked to common gingival pathologies.  

The summary above strictly adheres to two-sentence requirement while focusing only on clinically significant facts related to gingival health and nutritional deficiencies.
